title: hydrangea arborescens var. vulgaris
intro: Hydrangea arborescens var. vulgaris, also known as Wild Blazing Star or Smooth Hydrangea, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Hydrangea arborescens var. vulgaris are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments, including urinary tract infections and respiratory issues.
